dataneeds.Label: Individual case data
dataneeds.Description: One row by case, pseudonymized linkabe data, including: date of diagnostic, onset of symptoms, symptoms description, age, sex, geographical area, imported case identifier, cluster ID, Individual identifier)

dataneeds.Label: Contact-level exposure data
dataneeds.Description: One row by contact, pseudonymized linkable data, including: context of contact/setting, last exposure date, travel history, date of recovery, link to confirmed case, cluster identifier, exposure via animals if relevant

dataneeds.Label: Individual mortality records
dataneeds.Description: One row by death, pseudonymized linkable data, including information on geographical area, sex, age, cause of death

dataneeds.Label: Genomic sequencing database
dataneeds.Description: Sequencing and corresponding metadata (date, location, host species), variant lineage classification

dataneeds.Label: Number of new cases by country
dataneeds.Description: By date

dataneeds.Label: Number of new hospitalisations by country
dataneeds.Description: By date

dataneeds.Label: Number of deaths by country
dataneeds.Description: By date

dataneeds.Label: Intervention (medical counter measure or non-pharmaceutical intervention) by country
dataneeds.Description: Type of intervention, start and end date, country of implementation

dataneeds.Label: Hospitalisation records
dataneeds.Description: One row by hospitalisation, pseudonymized linkabe data, including: institution, age, sex, geographical area, comorbidities, date of admission, date of discharge, date of ICU admission, date of ICU discharge, date of death, date of transfer

dataneeds.Label: Laboratory tests (in animals) records
dataneeds.Description: One row by test including: test result, species, geographical location of animal herding/capture or sampling, type of test, date of sampling, laboratory code

dataneeds.Label: Diagnostic test characteristics
dataneeds.Description: Including test sensitivity, specificity, limit of detection

dataneeds.Label: Diagnostic test regulatory approval
dataneeds.Description: type of test with approval date

dataneeds.Label: Intervention assessment outcomes
dataneeds.Description: Including study design, type of measure, comparator/control group specifications, effect size, efficacy. Apply to both therapeutic and NPI

dataneeds.Label: Reimbursed medication data
dataneeds.Description: Pseudonymized linkable data, including: sex, age, presence of comorbidities, immunocomproside status, pregnancy status.

dataneeds.Label: Number of ICU beds
dataneeds.Description: Granularity: hospital level, also include extension capacity within X hours. Total and real-time availability

dataneeds.Label: Number of general ward beds
dataneeds.Description: Granularity: hospital level, also include extension capacity within X hours. Total and real-time availability

dataneeds.Label: Number of surge capacity beds
dataneeds.Description: Granularity: hospital level, also include extension capacity within X hours. Total and real-time availability

dataneeds.Label: Number of trained ICU staff available
dataneeds.Description: Granularity: hospital level, also include extension capacity within X hours. Total and real-time availability

dataneeds.Label: Equipment inventory data
dataneeds.Description: Daily updated stock, Including: PPE category (masks by type, gloves, gowns), expiration date, storage conditions

dataneeds.Label: Survey data on adherence to intervention
dataneeds.Description: Assessing willingness to comply, perceived effectiveness, barriers to adoption, and trust in authorities

dataneeds.Label: Diagnostic tests inventory data
dataneeds.Description: Daily updated stock, including: type of material (PCR, antigneic kit, reagents, nasopharyngeal swab), expiration date. Required at national and subnational levels

dataneeds.Label: Laboratory test records
dataneeds.Description: One row by test, pseudonymized linkabe data, including: date of sampling, date of test, date of entry, type of test, prescription reason, prescriber, test performer, test result, laboratory code

dataneeds.Label: Number of imported live animals
dataneeds.Description: By species and by country of origin

dataneeds.Label: Number of border closures
dataneeds.Description: Not limited to crisis-related

dataneeds.Label: Mobility data
dataneeds.Description: From mobile device logs, geolocalization data, public transport boardings

dataneeds.Label: Socio-demographic data
dataneeds.Description: Pseudonymized linkable data, includig: age, sex, geographical area, household composition, migration background, occupation

dataneeds.Label: Clinical staff on duty
dataneeds.Description: Granularity: hospital level, count by shift

dataneeds.Label: Clinical staff absent
dataneeds.Description: Granularity: hospital level, count by shift

dataneeds.Label: Number of isolation/quarantine beds
dataneeds.Description: Granularity: institution level, also include extension capacity within X hours, total and real-time

dataneeds.Label: Benchmark indicators for transfer and coordination from EU
Livestock and flock data
dataneeds.Description: Livestock density (animals per km²), number of flocks, farm density, access to wildlife by species. Required at subnational level

dataneeds.Label: Laboratory staff register
dataneeds.Description: List of laboratory staff with occupation, date of last training, competency areas, and work location (by institution)

dataneeds.Label: Count of delayed or incomplete deliveries for reagents/equipment (supplier to institution)
External quality assessment of laboratories
dataneeds.Description: Pass rate and outcome summary

dataneeds.Label: Frequency of lab audits
dataneeds.Description: Per year

dataneeds.Label: Average travel distance to nearest testing facility
dataneeds.Description: By geographical area

dataneeds.Label: Out-of-pocket testing cost as percentage of income
Population size of target groups
dataneeds.Description: By age, sex and geographical area (national and subnational)

dataneeds.Label: Real-world effectiveness of interventions
dataneeds.Description: By  target group

dataneeds.Label: Proportion of population eligible for intervention
Rate of adverse events per medical counter measure
Drug inventory data
dataneeds.Description: Daily updated stock, including: drug product, expiration date, storage conditions, unit cost

dataneeds.Label: Weather data
dataneeds.Description: Daily update

dataneeds.Label: Date of last system readiness assessment
List of gaps identified during last system assessment
Gap category (workforce, supply chain, governance)
dataneeds.Description: Requires standardised categories

dataneeds.Label: Average time to address identified gaps
Number of ventilators available and functional
Count of oxygen cylinders available
dataneeds.Description: By institution

dataneeds.Label: Average delivery time from central stock to institution
dataneeds.Description: For reagents and equipment

dataneeds.Label: Number of reported supply chain disruptions
dataneeds.Description: For reagents and equipment

dataneeds.Label: Target groups identified from national prioritisation policy
dataneeds.Description: By category: HCWs, elderly, etc.

dataneeds.Label: Allocated stock per target group
dataneeds.Description: For pharmaceutical and non-pharmaceutical prevention tools, including PPE

dataneeds.Label: Existence of allocation mechanism from national preparedness plan
Healthcare worker register
dataneeds.Description: Pseudonymized linkable data, including: occupation, speciality, institution

dataneeds.Label: Existence of triage protocol
dataneeds.Description: With protocol version date

dataneeds.Label: Number of institutions applying triage protocol
Average response time to emergency calls
Survey data on acceptance of implemented measures
dataneeds.Description: Assessing trust in health authorities, reasons for refusal or delay, adherence to preventive measures, cultural practices affecting adherence, social or economic barriers

dataneeds.Label: Number of interventions aligned with WHO/ECDC guidance
dataneeds.Description: Based on reference list of interventions

dataneeds.Label: Proportion of implemented measures consistent with international standards
dataneeds.Description: Based on reference list of interventions

dataneeds.Label: Number of local health institutions equipped to deliver interventions
Percentage of institutions reporting logistics bottlenecks
Projected equipment demand
dataneeds.Description: Daily projected demand, including: PPE category (masks by type, gloves, gowns)

dataneeds.Label: Proportion of fulfilled requests of equipment
dataneeds.Description: By institution, including PPE, therapeutics, both partially or fully fulfilled

dataneeds.Label: Prevalence of reported anxiety/depression
dataneeds.Description: Tracked over time

dataneeds.Label: Travel and public health advisories issued by other countries
dataneeds.Description: Issuing country, date, restriction type, withdrawal date

dataneeds.Label: Proportion of population with online access to essential services
Proportion of population with access to delivery services
Count of job losses by sector
Travel history
dataneeds.Description: Date of entry, country of origin, transport mode, journey duration

dataneeds.Label: Positive test on arrival
dataneeds.Description: All tests performed on arrival, with positive/negative result

dataneeds.Label: Average staff-to-beneficiary ratio in social services
Percentage of service coverage for vulnerable groups
Number with reported shortages in essential goods
dataneeds.Description: Per households or individuals

dataneeds.Label: Vaccine dose administration records
dataneeds.Description: One row by vaccine dose, pseudonymized linkable data, including: age, sex, geographical area, vaccine product, vaccine administration setup

dataneeds.Label: Seroprevalence
dataneeds.Description: By regional level, age groups, sex

dataneeds.Label: Public survey responses on perceived social impact
Baseline laboratory diagnostic testing capacity
dataneeds.Description: Samples/day under routine conditions

dataneeds.Label: Count of laboratories maintaining pathogen-specific diagnostic capability
dataneeds.Description: Including animal laboratories

dataneeds.Label: Baseline genomic sequencing capacity
dataneeds.Description: Samples/week

dataneeds.Label: Annual pandemic funding level
dataneeds.Description: For surveillance, pharmaceutical and non-pharmaceutical prevention tools

dataneeds.Label: Existence and type of legal basis for intervention
dataneeds.Description: Yes/no + legal instrument type

dataneeds.Label: Intervention listing impact and legal aspects
dataneeds.Description: Including type of legal text, date and validity period, geographical scope, level of restriction, documentation of proportionality, impact on fundamental rights, ethical assesment performed

dataneeds.Label: Median waiting time for elective surgery
dataneeds.Description: In days

dataneeds.Label: Median waiting time for specialist consultation
dataneeds.Description: In days

dataneeds.Label: Number of emergency admissions for conditions previously deferred
Proportion of late-stage diagnoses for selected conditions
Number of additional operating sessions scheduled to reduce backlog
Existence of individual Appeals or redress mechanism for persons affected
Percentage of procedures completed vs postponed
Deployment time from request to operational status
dataneeds.Description: In hours

dataneeds.Label: Number of licensed isolation rooms available and functional
Number of staff pre-assigned to surge or modular units
Proportion of modular units compliant with WHO IPC biosafety standards
Average operational duration of modular units without resupply
Hand hygiene stations functional
dataneeds.Description: Per institution

dataneeds.Label: Number of negative pressure rooms available and functional
Proportion of population within defined access radius
Number of households reporting food insecurity
Number of households with risk of eviction or homelessness
Number of active social service centers
dataneeds.Description: Per geographical area

dataneeds.Label: Percentage of healthcare staff absenteeism
dataneeds.Description: By type of reason (illness, quarantine, etc.)

dataneeds.Label: Percentage of waste safely treated and disposed
Number of health institutions using standardized formats for data reporting
Geographic coverage of deployable modular units
Proportion of institutions with waste segregation in practice
Frequency of biomedical waste collection
dataneeds.Description: Per week

dataneeds.Label: Availability of functional incinerators
dataneeds.Description: Count per institution

dataneeds.Label: Number of reported breaches in waste disposal protocols
dataneeds.Description: Requires standardised definition of breach

dataneeds.Label: Population size
dataneeds.Description: National (including various geographical area, age and sex) and international level

dataneeds.Label: Spatial data (geographical boundaries of territorial units)
dataneeds.Description: For various geographical levels, required for generation of maps, including wildlife habitat maps, livestock farm locations, and wildlife-livestock interface areas

dataneeds.Label: Home and hotel quarantine capacity
dataneeds.Description: Number of designated quarantine places by type and location

dataneeds.Label: Number and location of testing facilities
dataneeds.Description: Including airport and border testing points

dataneeds.Label: Number of staff dedicated to contact tracing
dataneeds.Description: By institution and region

dataneeds.Label: Diagnostic test production capacity
dataneeds.Description: Units per day by manufacturer and test type

dataneeds.Label: Primary care activity data
dataneeds.Description: GP consultation rates, primary care capacity and appointment data

dataneeds.Label: Cross-sector surge support capacity
dataneeds.Description: Veterinary, military, and private sector equipment and staff available for medical surge

dataneeds.Label: Analytical capacity and data integration assessment output
dataneeds.Description: Data linkage capability, interoperability standards, governance framework, analytical workforce

dataneeds.Label: Economic evaluation and cost-effectiveness of interventions
dataneeds.Description: Cost per outcome avoided, by intervention type

dataneeds.Label: Funding status and continuity of community and civil society organisations
In-vitro virological characteristics
dataneeds.Description: Including infectivity experiments in animals
